title: Manuscript Validation Report
summary: Claim-evidence alignment check for the real-hardware FA4 B200 draft.

checks.evidence_check: All numerical claims trace to metrics.json rows or analysis-campaign-summary records from real B200 runs.
checks.citation_check: References are carried over from the previous verified bibliography; no new unverified citations added.
checks.figure_check: Figures 1 and 2 are regenerated from refined_validation_predictions.csv and refined_query_predictions.csv; Figure 3 is the conceptual pipeline diagram.
checks.language_hygiene_check: No operator/agent/route-control wording in manuscript prose.
checks.bundle_readiness_check: Draft, figures, references, and source CSVs are co-located in the bundle directory.
